shipyard_neo_endpoint.hint: Shipyard Neo(Bay) API endpoint. Default: http://127.0.0.1:8114.

shipyard_neo_access_token.hint: Bay API key. Leave empty to auto-discover Bay credentials.json.

shipyard_neo_profile.hint: Shipyard Neo sandbox profile, for example python-default.

shipyard_neo_ttl.hint: Shipyard Neo sandbox TTL in seconds.
